name: Claude Code
notes: This repository's dogfooding workspace opts the local Claude Code adapter into exec mode for the narrow T-003 pilot; generated scaffolds should still stay manual by default.

On this Windows machine the repo-local dogfooding profile uses `cmd.exe /d /s /c claude ...` because direct PowerShell invocation of the local shim resolves to `claude.ps1`, which is blocked by script-execution policy.

The locally confirmed non-interactive shape is `claude --model sonnet --bare --output-format json -p` with `stdinMode: promptFile`, and `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` allows the inspection-first pilot to read scoped repo files without interactive permission prompts.

A real T-003 launch showed that `claude auth status` alone was not enough under the executor's stripped child env: forwarding `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` plus `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` is required on this machine for the non-interactive print-mode path to stay logged in.
Keep this profile narrow and local-only until the real run path is proven stable through task-local evidence.
